capabilities: Apply domain-specific constraints to the Weighted Criteria Matrix to enhance decision-making accuracy within the meta.protocol knowledge base.

procedure.action: Initialize the Weighted Criteria Matrix by loading domain-specific constraints from the meta.protocol KB using the load_constraints function; ensure constraints are applied to relevant criteria using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.
Execute the option evaluation by invoking evaluate_options with the initialized matrix; assert that error_count < 1 and result_valid = true to ensure evaluation integrity.

Log the operation_duration_ms and result_code to the audit trail using the log_operation function to maintain a detailed execution record using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.
Restate the evaluation procedure by applying domain-specific constraints using the restate_procedure function; verify that error_count < 1 and result_valid = true.
Assert the output of the procedure by using validate_output with domain-specific tooling; ensure error_count < 1 and result_valid = true for output consistency.

summary: Specialize the Weighted Criteria Matrix for option evaluation by integrating domain-specific constraints from a meta.protocol derived knowledge base.
title: Weighted Criteria Matrix Specialization for Meta Protocol

failureConditions: Inaccurate evaluations when domain-specific constraints are not loaded, causing misalignment with the meta.protocol KB.
Inconsistent results when error_count is not monitored, leading to undetected evaluation failures.
Audit trail gaps when operation_duration_ms and result_code are not logged, causing loss of execution traceability.
metrics: that error_count < 1 and result_valid = true to ensure evaluation integrity
the output of the procedure by using validate_output with domain-specific tooling
successConditions: audit_log.contains(result_code); assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
